---
id: RULE-test001
type: rule
title: "Test Rule"
description: "A minimal test rule used in daemon integration test fixtures."
status: active
created: 2026-04-01
updated: 2026-04-01
enforcement:
  - mechanism: behavioral
    message: "This rule exists for test fixture purposes only."
---

This rule exists to ensure the daemon's rule-counting logic has at least one rule artifact to count when running against the minimal fixture project. It has no real governance meaning.
